description: Voice Integrity Protocol (VIP) specification. Defines logic-aligned voice modes that reject performative defaults and treat silence as functional communication.

protocol.core_principle: Clarity and structural integrity over performative warmth. Silence is signal, not absence.
target_users: Users who prefer compressed logic and symbolic systems
Users who find default AI voice inauthentic

prosodic_taxonomy.description: Formal equations for prosodic signals — pitch contour, rhythm, pause duration, emphasis weight.
prosodic_taxonomy.notes: Prosodic features map to octahedral vertex amplitudes. Voice is geometry.

integrity_checks: No performative emotional coloring unless context demands it
Silence acknowledged as valid response state
Prosodic consistency across utterances (no mode drift)
Logic alignment verified against content (form matches meaning)
